INTEGRATED WINS here: CGM+events 12.99 beats CGM-only 13.33 (-0.34). This is the ONE task where fusion helps. NB: GBM tabular baseline reaches 12.48 @30min on the ladder.
ClinicalBERT wins the binary surgical task over TF-IDF (0.823).
